testcase.name: test_PostForm_for_valid_data
testcase.failure:
self = <app.tests.test_forms.ModelsView testMethod=test_PostForm_for_valid_data>
def test_PostForm_for_valid_data(self): form = UserRegisterForm(data={"username": "testas", "email":"pastas@pastas.lt", "password1":"slaptazodis", "password2":"slaptazodis"}) print(form.errors) > self.assertTrue(form.is_valid()) E AssertionError: False is not true
app\tests\test_forms.py:17: AssertionError
testcase.system-out:
--------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------
  • password2
    • The password is too similar to the email address.
